payload.title: Metro-North Railroad Procurements

tool_args.label: CDOT Option Fully Funded by CDOT

payload.claim_text: The Option is fully funded by CDOT.
payload.subject: CDOT Option
payload.description: Funding responsibility for the CDOT Option locomotives

evidence_refs.source_quote: This option will be fully funded by CDOT.

payload.claim_text: The six dual-mode locomotives under this CDOT Option will replace the CDOT locomotives that are beyond their 25-year service life.
payload.subject: CDOT locomotive fleet
payload.description: Purpose of replacement: CDOT locomotives beyond 25-year service life

evidence_refs.source_quote: The six dual-mode locomotives under this CDOT Option will replace the CDOT locomotives that are beyond their 25-year service life.

tool_args.label: Fixed Price Contingent on Award by July 31, 2023

payload.claim_text: Ultimately, a fixed price of $78,828,018 was agreed upon, contingent upon award of the CDOT Option by July 31, 2023.
payload.subject: CDOT Option pricing
payload.description: Fixed price contingent on award by July 31, 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Ultimately, a fixed price of $78,828,018 was agreed upon, contingent upon award of the CDOT Option by July 31, 2023.

tool_args.label: Base Contract Resulted from Competitive RFP

payload.claim_text: The base contract, resulting from a competitive Request for Proposal ("RFP") and approved by the Board in December 2020, is for the purchase of 19 dual-mode locomotives, as well as related equipment
payload.subject: Contract 244941 base contract
payload.description: Base contract competitively bid through RFP process

evidence_refs.source_quote: The base contract, resulting from a competitive Request for Proposal ("RFP") and approved by the Board in December 2020

payload.claim_text: Siemens has the experience, technical capability, resources, and facilities to perform the work required. The Controller's Office found that there is reasonable assurance Siemens can perform the work under this option.
payload.subject: Siemens Mobility, Inc.
payload.description: Determination by Controller's Office that Siemens can perform the work

evidence_refs.source_quote: Siemens has the experience, technical capability, resources, and facilities to perform the work required.

tool_args.label: FTA Transit Vehicle Manufacturer Program Applies

payload.claim_text: Because the base contract is FTA funded, federal terms and conditions apply. Therefore, the FTA Transit Vehicle Manufacturer program applies. Siemens complies with this FTA program.
payload.subject: Contract 244941
payload.description: FTA funding and Transit Vehicle Manufacturer program compliance

evidence_refs.source_quote: Because the base contract is FTA funded, federal terms and conditions apply. Therefore, the FTA Transit Vehicle Manufacturer program applies. Siemens complies with this FTA program.

tool_args.label: Siemens Certified Not Doing Business in Russia

payload.claim_text: Siemens has certified that pursuant to EO 16, it is not doing business in Russia.
payload.subject: Siemens Mobility, Inc.
payload.description: EO 16 Russia certification

evidence_refs.source_quote: Siemens has certified that pursuant to EO 16, it is not doing business in Russia.

tool_args.label: 78-Month Delivery Period from Notice of Award

payload.claim_text: Delivery of the six dual-mode locomotives is scheduled to begin in the second quarter of 2027 and be completed in the fall of 2027 for an overall delivery period of 78 months from Notice of Award.
payload.subject: CDOT Option locomotives
payload.description: Delivery timeline and period from Notice of Award

evidence_refs.source_quote: overall delivery period of 78 months from Notice of Award
